description: Style NoteNow carry your monetary essentials in style with this leather wallet from new hide. The wallets come with a stylish upper and spacious inner making it must-have accessory!Product DetailsBlack two-fold wallet with two main compartmentsMultiple card holders, insert pockets, a buttoned pocket on the right and id card holder on the leftBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeDimensions: 11.5 cm x 9 cm
